name: onboarding-checklist
title: Onboarding Checklist
author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
description: Linear onboarding checklist with numbered steps, completion indicators, progress bar, step locking, and dismissible success state.
docs: Pass `steps` array with `label`, `complete`, `href`, and optional `locked`. Use `onDismiss` for dismiss behavior. Provide `renderLink` for framework-specific routing.
